exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your nonprofit startup forward
items: Research and document 5 existing nonprofits that address similar issues to your mission
Identify and interview 3 individuals from your target beneficiary community about their needs and challenges
Create a detailed mission statement and define your specific target population and geographic scope
Research and document the legal requirements for nonprofit incorporation in your state
Develop a comprehensive theory of change that maps how your activities will lead to your desired impact
Identify and recruit 3-5 potential founding board members with complementary skills and community connections
